title: Using Khan Academy's assignment reports to support mastery learning
topic_path: Using assignments and reports on Khan Academy
Using assignments reports to support mastery learning
Using Khan Academy's assignment reports to support mastery learning

assessment_items.question_content:
Below is an image of an assignment scores report.

**Complete the labels on the image.**

[[☃ label-image 1]]

markers.label: Dot over a box with a green checkmark
Dot over a grey box with a dash in it
a box with a green checkmark
a box with a green 100 in it

assessment_items.question_content:
Below is an image of a Khan Academy report.

[[☃ image 1]]

**Which report is shown?**

[[☃ dropdown 1]]

options.alt: An image of a Khan Academy report. The top says Assignment scores. Then there is a list of student names with their scores on different exercises, articles, and videos.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Fill in the blanks**.

If the assignment is an exercise, quiz, or unit test the student's best score will be shown in a color-coded box. Boxes appear as [[☃ dropdown 1]] for scores from $0\%-59\%$, [[☃ dropdown 2]] for scores from $60\%-99\%$, or [[☃ dropdown 3]] for a score of $100\%$ based on the score earned by the student.
hints: If the assignment is an exercise, quiz, or unit test the student's best score will be shown in a color-coded box. Boxes appear as **red** for scores from $0\%-59\%$, **yellow** for scores from $60\%-99\%$, or **green**  for a score of $100\%$ based on the score earned by the student.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which report would be most useful for identifying common mistakes?**

[[☃ dropdown 1]]
hints: The **assignment responses report** shows which question students found most challenging which helps teachers identify common mistakes.

assessment_items.question_content:
Below is an example of a Khan Academy report.

[[☃ image 1]]

**Which report is shown?**

[[☃ dropdown 1]]

options.alt: A Khan Academy report. The label says Slope from two points. On the left, it shows all the questions and the overall score for the item. In the middle, it shows an example question. On the left, it shows responses and how many students answer each response.

assessment_items.question_content:
If you've chosen to provide different questions for each student, the questions on the Responses report will appear in the order students found them most challenging. 

**True or false.**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Fill in the blank.**

The [[☃ dropdown 1]] tab is a great tool to help you organize and manage your class assignments effectively.
hints: The **manage** tab is a great tool to help you organize and manage your class assignments effectively.

assessment_items.question_content:
From the Manage tab, you can change assignment details, such as the due date, the students assigned, and more.

**True or false.**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Fill in the blank.**

From the [[☃ dropdown 1]] tab, you can view individual student scores and whether a student has started, completed, or not started the assignment. You can also see their score if the assignment has been completed.
hints: From the **Scores** tab, you can view individual student scores and whether a student has started, completed, or not started the assignment. You can also see their score if the assignment has been completed.
